samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a module of a 64-bit ripple carry adder, which includes several registers to enable the pipeline stages. The output result is available on the result port, and the o_en = 1 indicates the availability of the result.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="PIPELINE_STAGES">Number of pipeline stages, which is 3.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="i_en_reg" description="Enable signal for addition operation">Set i_en_reg to 0.</reg>
            <reg id="adda_reg" width_description="[63:0]" description="64-bit input operand A">Initialize adda_reg to 0.</reg>
            <reg id="addb_reg" width_description="[63:0]" description="64-bit input operand B">Initialize addb_reg to 0.</reg>
            <reg id="o_en_reg" description="Output enable signal">Set o_en_reg to 0.</reg>
            <reg id="result_reg" width_description="[64:0]" description="65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb">Initialize result_reg to 0.</reg>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <assign description="Addition operation for pipeline stage 0">sum_reg_0 = adda_reg_0 + addb_reg_0 + carry_reg_0.</assign>
            <assign description="Addition operation for pipeline stage 1">sum_reg_1 = adda_reg_1 + addb_reg_1 + carry_reg_1.</assign>
            <assign description="Addition operation for pipeline stage 2">sum_reg_2 = adda_reg_2 + addb_reg_2 + carry_reg_2.</assign>
            <assign description="Addition operation for pipeline stage 3">sum_reg_3 = adda_reg_3 + addb_reg_3 + carry_reg_3.</assign>
        </combinational_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <always description="Behavioral description of sequential logic">
                if (rst_n == 0) begin
                    i_en_reg <= 0;
                    adda_reg <= 0;
                    addb_reg <= 0;
                    o_en_reg <= 0;
                    result_reg <= 0;
                end else begin
                    i_en_reg <= i_en;
                    adda_reg <= adda;
                    addb_reg <= addb;
                    o_en_reg <= o_en;
                    result_reg <= result;
                end
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
